summary: ReAssure 2.0 is a comprehensive health insurance product offering coverage from ₹5 Lacs to ₹100 Lacs with features like ReAssure+ unlimited coverage after first claim, Booster+ carry forward benefits, and various optional add-ons.
coverage: In-patient Care (including AYUSH) - Covered up to Sum Insured
Pre-Hospitalisation - 60 Days, Covered up to Sum Insured
Post-Hospitalisation - 180 Days, Covered up to Sum Insured
Modern Treatments - Covered up to Sum Insured
Road Ambulance - Covered up to Sum Insured
Air Ambulance - up to ₹2,50,000 per Hospitalisation
Home Care/Domiciliary - Covered up to Sum Insured
Organ Donor - Covered up to Sum Insured
Annual Health Checkup - up to ₹500 for every ₹1 Lac Base Sum Insured (Individual: Maximum ₹5,000 per Insured; Family Floater: Maximum ₹10,000 per policy)
Shared Accommodation - Up to ₹15 Lac Base Sum Insured: ₹800 per day; Maximum ₹4,800. Above ₹15 Lac Base Sum Insured: ₹1,000 per day; Maximum ₹6,000
Second Medical Opinion - Once for any condition in a Policy Year
co_pay: 20% co-payment applies if treatment taken in a non-Tiered Network Hospital
claims_information: 30 minutes cashless claim processing for pre-authorisation requests
Minimum 48 hours continuous hospitalisation required for Hospital Cash benefit
Minimum 24 hours hospitalisation required for AYUSH treatment in AYUSH Hospital

faqs.question: What is the sum insured range for ReAssure 2.0?
faqs.answer: The Base Sum Insured options are ₹5 Lacs, ₹7.5 Lacs, ₹10 Lacs, ₹15 Lacs, ₹20 Lacs, ₹25 Lacs, ₹50 Lacs, and ₹100 Lacs.

faqs.question: What is ReAssure+ benefit?
faqs.answer: ReAssure+ is triggered after the 1st claim and provides unlimited coverage forever. Each claim will be up to the Base Sum Insured and you pay premium as per your entry age till a claim is paid.

faqs.question: How does the Booster+ benefit work?
faqs.answer: Booster+ carries forward unutilised Base Sum Insured to the next policy year. 5X variant allows maximum up to 5 times of Base Sum Insured, while 10X variant allows maximum up to 10 times of Base Sum Insured.

faqs.question: What is the pre-hospitalisation coverage period?
faqs.answer: Pre-hospitalisation expenses are covered for 60 days and are covered up to the Sum Insured.

faqs.question: What is the post-hospitalisation coverage period?
faqs.answer: Post-hospitalisation expenses are covered for 180 days and are covered up to the Sum Insured.

faqs.question: What ambulance coverage is provided?
faqs.answer: Road Ambulance is covered up to Sum Insured, while Air Ambulance is covered up to ₹2,50,000 per hospitalisation.

faqs.question: What is the Annual Health Checkup benefit?
faqs.answer: For defined list of tests, coverage is up to ₹500 for every ₹1 Lac Base Sum Insured with maximum ₹5,000 per Insured for Individual policies and maximum ₹10,000 per policy for Family Floater policies.

faqs.question: What discount can I get with Live Healthy benefit?
faqs.answer: You can get up to 30% discount on premium at the time of renewal with the Live Healthy benefit.

faqs.question: What are the Hospital Cash benefit amounts?
faqs.answer: Up to ₹5 Lac Base Sum Insured: ₹1,000/day; Between ₹7.5 Lacs to ₹15 Lac Base Sum Insured: ₹2,000/day; Above ₹15 Lac Base Sum Insured: ₹4,000/day.

faqs.question: What Personal Accident coverage options are available?
faqs.answer: You can choose from 1X, 2X, 3X, 4X, or 5X of base sum insured with maximum coverage up to ₹1 Crore.

faqs.question: What is included in Safeguard benefit?
faqs.answer: Safeguard includes Claim Safeguard (non-payable items covered as per list I), Booster+ Safeguard (no impact on Booster+ if claim is less than ₹50,000), and Sum Insured Safeguard (CPI linked increase).

faqs.question: What is included in Safeguard+ benefit?
faqs.answer: Safeguard+ includes Claim Safeguard+ (non-payable items covered as per list I, II, III, IV), Booster+ Safeguard+ (no impact on Booster+ if claim is less than ₹1,00,000), and Sum Insured Safeguard+ (CPI linked increase).

faqs.question: What are the Tiered Network benefits?
faqs.answer: Tiered Network provides 15% discount on premium, but a co-payment of 20% applies if treatment is taken in a non-Tiered Network Hospital.

faqs.question: How fast is the cashless claim processing?
faqs.answer: Niva Bupa processes pre-authorisation requests within 30 minutes for all active policies, subject to receiving all required documents and information.

faqs.question: Is AYUSH treatment covered?
faqs.answer: Yes, AYUSH treatment is covered as part of In-patient Care up to Sum Insured, with minimum 24 hours hospitalisation required in an AYUSH Hospital.

faqs.question: What is the shared accommodation benefit?
faqs.answer: For up to ₹15 Lac Base Sum Insured: ₹800 per day with maximum ₹4,800. For above ₹15 Lac Base Sum Insured: ₹1,000 per day with maximum ₹6,000.

faqs.question: How many times can I get Second Medical Opinion?
faqs.answer: Second Medical Opinion is available once for any condition in a policy year.

faqs.question: Is e-consultation unlimited?
faqs.answer: Yes, unlimited e-consultation is available within the network.

faqs.question: What is the minimum hospitalisation required for Hospital Cash?
faqs.answer: Minimum 48 hours of continuous hospitalisation is required for Hospital Cash benefit.

faqs.question: What is the maximum coverage period for Hospital Cash?
faqs.answer: Maximum coverage is offered for 30 days per policy year per insured person.

faqs.question: What deductible options are available?
faqs.answer: Annual Aggregate Deductible options include ₹20,000, ₹30,000, ₹50,000, and ₹1,00,000.

faqs.question: How many lives does Niva Bupa cover?
faqs.answer: Niva Bupa covers 2 Crore+ lives.

faqs.question: What is the customer helpline number?
faqs.answer: The customer helpline number is 1860-500-8888.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for Live Healthy benefit?
faqs.answer: Eligible persons are all members except son/daughter under a Family Floater policy and any member of age at least 18 years under an Individual policy.

faqs.question: When is Annual Health Checkup available?
faqs.answer: Annual Health Checkup is available from Day 1 and only on cashless with network providers.

faqs.question: What is the Product UIN for ReAssure 2.0?
faqs.answer: The Product UIN is NBHHLIP26042V022526.

faqs.question: What is the IRDAI Registration Number for Niva Bupa?
faqs.answer: The IRDAI Registration Number is 145.

faqs.question: What happens to premium rates under ReAssure+?
faqs.answer: Under ReAssure+, you pay the premium as per your entry age until a claim is paid.

faqs.question: Are modern treatments covered?
faqs.answer: Yes, modern treatments are covered up to the Sum Insured.

faqs.question: What is the website for Niva Bupa?
faqs.answer: The website is www.nivabupa.com.
